title: Speed zones / special speed limits (Sec. TPR-84)

street.description: Street the speed zone applies to

direction.description: Direction of travel; empty for one-liner entries that state no direction

entry_type.description: Source form this row came from

start_point.description: Start of the segment (street/landmark, or GPS 'lat, lon'); empty for interior stanza sub-segments whose boundary the source does not name

end_point.description: End of the segment (street/landmark, or GPS 'lat, lon'); empty for interior stanza sub-segments

length_miles.description: Sub-segment length in miles (stanza/one-liner); empty for table rows, which give endpoints not length

offset_miles.description: Cumulative distance from the stanza's start to this sub-segment's start; 0 for the first/only segment; empty for table and one-liner rows

source_text.description: Verbatim source (whitespace/quote-normalized). NOT unique: every sub-segment of a multi-segment stanza shares its stanza's text

notes.description: Sub-segment index, source-defect flags, or checksum discrepancies; never carries primary data
